abilities.description: When you fabricate a personalized energy ward or bio-synthetic charm, envision it and name the specific person or creature type it protects against. Then roll +wits. On a strong hit, the wearer gains +2 when opposing the designated target through a move. If a 1 is rolled on the action die, the charge is depleted and the artifact goes offline. On a weak hit, as above, but the wearer gains +1 instead of +2.
As above, and you may configure the artifact to defend against anomalies and hostile phenomena - such as psionic attacks, alien pathogens, or reality distortions.
The wearer may make the @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.f4dec946415d8e57]{Aid Your Ally} move by leveraging the artifact's properties. If they do, they take +1 momentum.
